content.full_text:
Letter from Novoa Jewelers to Fair Political Practice Commission

---

Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J. St.
Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, Calif. 95804

Mr. Jonathan Rothman
Counsel Legal Division FPPC

Dear Mr. Rothman,

In regards to our recent conversation pertaining to a possible conflict of interest under section 18703.5. We are supplying the following information as per your request.

By reviewing our gross sales records, we have determined our customer base is equal to approximately 25% of the population or households of the jurisdiction.

The customer in question is a property owner in action being taken by the planning commission and is also the Real Estate Broker for the developer of this project.

Said customer has maintained a personal as well as business open charge account with our firm for a number of years. During any given 12 month period, purchases have exceeded one tenth of one percent of our gross sales.

If any further information is required, do not hesitate to contact me.

With my sincere appreciation,

Robert G. Novoa
City of Newman Planning Commissioner

---

Novoa Jewelers Letterhead
Novoa Jewelers Since 1973

The image you provided is a blank sheet of paper with two horizontal lines near the top and bottom edges. There is no visible text, images, or markings on this page aside from these lines. If you have any specific questions or need further assistance, please provide more details or context.
